ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar May-22-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kathleen Durrans for (Trustee) Michael Gin.

Ms. Durrans reported that the 1% fee was reduced by the amount being paid to the CPA, that of the remaining amount of $8,500.00 to pay the trustees, $1,500.00 was paid to the former trustee, that using Mr. Gin's firm was efficient as everything was done in house, that the trust is increasing each year and that the fees are reasonable. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputies Lopes & Santiago. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #5, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jun-23-2014 Continued To Jul-21-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Matt Owens for Michael Gin (Petitioner/Trustee).

The Court explained to Mr. Owens that the prior Trustee (Frank Maiocco) can not simply turn over the responsibility to somebody and that he needs to be the petitioner and verify his final accounting. The accounting petition was continued to July 21, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the prior Trustee to take responsibility and verify the accounting.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #4, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Feb-19-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Doug Barnes for and with Horace Hayes (Sole Income Beneficiary). Linda Dvorak and Kathleen Durrans for Frank Maiocco (Current Trustee). Richard Pierotti (CPA) and Micheal Gin (CPA/Proposed Successor Trustee) also present.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the Attorney's fees, the Accountant's fees and the Trustee's fees, as well as the issue regarding appointment of Successor Trustee (Family Member versus Neutral Fiduciary). The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
